description_long: This is a two-story wooden house with a prominent gable roof covered in dark brown shingles. The front facade features a central entryway with a stone arch, flanked by two sets of windows on each floor, all of which emit a warm yellow glow suggesting interior lighting. A small balcony with wooden railings sits above the entrance, adding architectural interest and depth. The side views reveal the house's timber construction, with visible horizontal planks and a slightly protruding upper story. The roof has decorative end beams and a ridge running along its length, with some shingles appearing uneven for a rustic effect. The rear of the house is simpler, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing the front as the main point of access.
description: A rustic two-story wooden house with a dark gable roof, central stone-arched entry, glowing windows, and a small balcony above the main door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a stone arch, glowing windows, and a balcony above the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the timber construction, protruding upper story, and the depth of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden wall with no windows or doors, and the full expanse of the shingled roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the wooden planks and the balcony's side profile.
attribute_entryway_design: Central stone-arched door with steps, flanked by windows and topped by a wooden balcony
